$schema: ATLVS Technologies design tokens — SINGLE source of truth for engineering. The generated theme (src/app/theme/themes/atlvs-product.css) and the kit's product-theme.css are derivatives; src/lib/theme/tokens-contract.test.ts guards three-way equality. Self-contained; no GHXSTSHIP deps.
note: v8.0 GHXSTSHIP mono-green — the whole ecosystem resolves to ONE accent (Accent 1 #2EDB3A) on the Background(#000)/Foreground(#EDEDED) duality. Products differentiate by type, layout & iconography, not hue. Functional signals, charts, signage & identity stay multi-hue. Supersedes v7.0 Monument 2.0 per-product hues (pink/amber/blue/orange).

atlvs.name: ATLVS
atlvs.scope: ERP × CRM × PM — internal org users + project-scoped external users

compvss.name: COMPVSS
compvss.scope: Field/venue workforce ops (ConnectTeam-class) — internal + external orgs

gvteway.name: GVTEWAY
gvteway.scope: Tickets, stores, directory, jobs, P2P, RFPs — public/engagement surfaces

legend.name: LEG3ND
legend.scope: Knowledge base / The Standard, LMS, resource hub, catalog, signage, XMCE engine, safety — on the XPMS 2.0 protocol

heading.role: display / headings / metrics — single black condensed weight. v7.0 Anton CEILING: display + h1/h2 only. h3/h4 render in Hanken Grotesk 700 (sentence case).

body.role: body / UI / h3-h4 — Title & sentence case

mono.role: eyebrows / overlines / mono labels / table headers — uppercase, tracked

mono-data.role: v7.0 functional-mono split — record IDs, code, .surface-terminal, and table data cells; Space Mono stays the eyebrow/label voice.

wordmark.role: logo lockup ONLY — constructed; the 'A' is a crossbar-less flipped 'V'. Never UI/headings.

type.googleFonts: Anton; Hanken Grotesk:400;500;600;700;800; Space Mono:400;700; IBM Plex Mono:400;500;600; Jost:300;400;500

neutral._note: v7.0 — 12-step neutral ramp, the authoring seed for surfaces/border/text. Light is ordered lightest→darkest (0=white); dark is ordered darkest→lightest (0=base ink) so 1000 is always the highest-contrast text in both modes. atlvs-product.css emits --p-neutral-0..1000 from these and maps the surface tokens onto ramp steps via var() (light: surface=0, bg=50, surface-2=100, border=200, border-2=300, text-3=600, text-2=700, text-1=1000 · dark: bg=0, surface=50, the rest identical). Guarded by tokens-contract.test.ts.

surface._note: v7.0 — derived from `neutral` (above). text-2 darkened off the ramp's step 700 (light #4A5563, dark #AEB6C4) for clearer hierarchy; text-3 holds the AA floor at step 600 (unchanged). All other values mirror their ramp step.

accent._note: Per product × mode. `accent` = bright brand fill (borders / weak tints / hover). `accent-text` = AA text/link ink. `accent-cta` + `accent-cta-contrast` = the deliberate AA-safe filled-button pair. `focus` = the focus-ring color (≥3:1). Transcribed verbatim from the generated theme atlvs-product.css; do not invent. v7.0 — atlvs-product.css additionally derives a per-product accent RAMP (--p-accent-50..900) from the resolved --k-acc via color-mix (tints toward --p-surface, shades toward --p-text-1) so tint backgrounds/borders/pressed states reference named steps instead of inline math; the ramp authors no new hexes here.

semantic-text._note: v7.0 — AA inks for small colored text (badges/alerts/chips). The base `semantic` hexes (above) are tuned for fills/dots/icons; these darker (light) / brighter (dark) variants clear 4.5:1 as text. warning/info base were retuned off the COMPVSS amber (#E9A23B) / GVTEWAY blue (#2563EB) accents to remove the collision. Emitted as --p-{success,warning,danger,info}-text in atlvs-product.css (mode-scoped). Certified in contrast.pairs.

breakpoints._note: Mobile-first min-widths (hand-authored in atlvs-product.css :root as --bp-* + --p-content-max; guarded by src/lib/theme/dataviz-tokens.test.ts). sm phones · md tablet · lg laptop · xl desktop · 2xl wide; product shells go single-column below md.

chart._note: Data-viz categorical ramp — 8 adjacency-contrasted series colors + chart chrome. Hand-authored in atlvs-product.css :root as --chart-1..8 / --chart-grid|axis|label; guarded by src/lib/theme/dataviz-tokens.test.ts. Mode-agnostic series (bright enough for light+dark); chrome derives from --p-* so it follows mode. Consumed by src/components/charts/* and kit-reports.css. Semantic up/down stay --p-success/--p-danger.

elevation._note: v7.0 — 5-step layered scale (elev-xs → elev-2xl), each pairing an ambient (soft, wide) + a direct (tight, contact) shadow. The legacy --p-shadow-sm/--p-shadow/--p-shadow-lg names are kept as ALIASES of elev-xs/elev-1/elev-3. atlvs-product.css overrides --p-elev-1/2/3 in the dark scope with stronger alpha + a 1px top inner highlight (neutral light-mode shadows are invisible on dark).
elevation.note: Dark mode leans on borders + the dark elev overrides over neutral shadow.

motion._note: Canonical 4-duration / 4-ease scale (mirrors src/app/theme/primitives.css). `--p-ease` is kept as a back-compat alias of motion-normal + ease-out.
motion.rule: Never transition a token-backed background across a theme switch — recolor instantly, animate filter/opacity. Motion respects prefers-reduced-motion (durations zero globally).

themeAxes.applied: data-ui="saas" data-product=… data-mode=… data-density=… data-accent=… on a root element; persisted to localStorage key 'atlvs-kit-v1'.

saasThemeHouseRules.A_casing: Casing is role-based and token-driven (--p-case-*): author content in sentence case, apply case via tokens. Default = sentence-case UI (buttons/labels/titles), UPPERCASE+tracking for eyebrows/mono-labels/table-headers, display heads in the typeface's native case (Anton UPPERCASE / Airport Title), Title Case only under an explicit XPMS governance scope.
saasThemeHouseRules.B_headingFamily: Headings use Anton (Monument). The retired rule naming Space Grotesk / Big Shoulders no longer applies — that was the cosmic GHXSTSHIP skin, which this kit does not import.
saasThemeHouseRules.C_eyebrow: Eyebrows = Space Mono. Silkscreen/pixel is retired for product.
saasThemeHouseRules.D_wordmark: Jost, spaced caps, nowrap, crossbar-less 'A'. Logo lockup only — never UI or headings.
saasThemeHouseRules.E_accentAA: Keep --p-accent (fills) distinct from --p-accent-text (text/links), deepened in light, brightened in dark, tuned for WCAG AA per mode.
saasThemeHouseRules.F_noLiterals: Components read tokens (--p-*, --brand-*) — never hardcode hex/px. No raw Tailwind color-scale literals.

contrast._note: Machine-checkable WCAG metadata (Move D2). src/lib/theme/contrast.test.ts recomputes every ratio from these hexes and fails CI when any drops below `min`. Body/link text = AA 4.5:1; focus rings + large/UI = AA 3:1. Ratios stamped 2026-06-17 — recompute on any token change.

signage._note: LEG3ND airport-wayfinding micro brand kit (ACRP 52 / FAA AC 150/5360-12F / AIGA-DOT / ISO 7010). Implemented in src/app/theme/kit-signage.css as the `--sign-*` token layer and rendered by src/components/signage/{SignIcon,SignPanel}.tsx over the public/brand/pictograms.svg sprite. src/lib/theme/signage-tokens.test.ts guards that the `seeds` below appear verbatim in kit-signage.css. The sole pictogram library is the 60 public-domain AIGA/U.S. DOT symbol signs (all `aiga-*` ids; legacy house `p-*` glyphs retired); metadata index src/lib/signage_pictograms.ts. Each sign colors from its category's airport tone (CATEGORY_TONE in src/lib/legend_signage.ts) → the `--sign-{tone}-field`/`-legend` tokens. Mode-agnostic; semantics fixed, palette white-labelable via the seeds.

seeds._note: The eight rebrand seeds — the ONLY place signage colors are authored. Override to re-skin wayfinding; the function map never moves.

functionMap._note: Airport semantics → field/legend seed pairs (≥70% contrast). Fixed mapping.

legibility._note: Cap height ↔ viewing distance (~1in cap / 10ft). Tiers map to SignPanel sm·md·lg·xl. capPx = on-screen render.

colorModel._note: TWO-COLOR RULE — every sign is exactly two colors, never three. POSITIVE = the symbol/legend (painted via currentColor = the tone's `legend`); NEGATIVE = the field AND the symbol's own counters/holes (the field token, carried into the sprite via the `--sign-knock` custom property). A counter is the field showing through, never white. The pictogram sprite is authored with only `currentColor` + `var(--sign-knock)`; PictogramPreview / SignPanel set `--sign-knock` to the tone field.

typography._note: The airport face. Mixed case (not all-caps) for word-shape recognition. Licensed Frutiger/Airport is NOT redistributed — degrades to the LEG3ND data-type=legend fallback until mounted.
